confirmSignup.subject: Confirm your Bayaan Classroom account
confirmSignup.preview: Confirm your email to activate your Bayaan Classroom account
confirmSignup.heading: Confirm your email
confirmSignup.body: Welcome to Bayaan Classroom! Click the button below to confirm your email address and activate your account.
confirmSignup.disclaimer: If you didn't create a Bayaan Classroom account, you can safely ignore this email.

magicLink.subject: Sign in to Bayaan Classroom
magicLink.preview: Your sign-in link for Bayaan Classroom
magicLink.heading: Sign in to Bayaan Classroom
magicLink.body: Click the button below to sign in to your Bayaan Classroom account. This link will sign you in without a password.
magicLink.disclaimer: This link will expire in 1 hour and can only be used once. If you didn't request a sign-in link, you can safely ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your Bayaan Classroom password
passwordReset.heading: Reset your password
passwordReset.body: We received a request to reset the password for your Bayaan Classroom account. Click the button below to choose a new password.
passwordReset.disclaimer: This link will expire in 1 hour. If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email — your password won't change.

emailChange.subjectNew: Confirm your new Bayaan Classroom email
emailChange.subjectCurrent: Your Bayaan Classroom email is being changed
emailChange.previewNew: Confirm your new Bayaan Classroom email address
emailChange.previewCurrent: Your Bayaan Classroom email address is being changed
emailChange.bodyNew: We received a request to change the email on your Bayaan Classroom account. Click the button below to confirm this is your new email address.
emailChange.bodyCurrent: A request was made to change the email address on your Bayaan Classroom account. We're notifying both the old and new addresses for security.
emailChange.warningNew: If you didn't request this change, do not click the link and contact support immediately.
emailChange.warningCurrent: If you didn't request this change, contact support immediately — your account may be at risk.

hero.lead: transform your mosque into a beacon of inclusive dawah with real-time sermon translation. reach hearts in every language.

howItWorks.title: how bayaan works
howItWorks.lead: get your mosque connected in minutes with our streamlined setup process

account.label: STEP
account.title: create your mosque account
account.body: sign up in minutes and set up your mosque profile with room configurations

room.label: STEP
room.title: create room
room.body: set up the room that listens to your sermon and translates it in real-time

golive.label: STEP
golive.title: press Go Live button
golive.body: start broadcasting with one click. your sermon is instantly translated

display.label: STEP
display.title: launch display
display.body: open the public display that will be visible for all mosque visitors

challenge.label: THE CHALLENGE
challenge.body: When I was a child, my father would take me to the Friday khutbah every week. I was a restless, hyperactive kid. The kind who found it nearly impossible to sit still for an hour, especially when I didn’t fully understand what was being said.

realization.label: THE REALIZATION
realization.body: Even though Arabic was the language of our home, my vocabulary was limited, and the khatib’s eloquent fusha felt like another world. I’d fidget, daydream, and, I’ll admit, sometimes annoy my father. If something like Bayaan had existed back then, live translations right in front of me, I might have listened more closely and connected more deeply.

universal.label: UNIVERSAL NEED
universal.body: And this isn’t just for non-Arabic speakers. Many Arabic speakers, especially younger generations or those who only speak a dialect, struggle with fusha too. This tool bridges that gap, helping both Arabic and non-Arabic speakers draw closer to the language of the Qur’an.

vision.label: THE VISION
vision.body: I’ve seen how my cousins back home became fluent in English simply by watching English movies with Arabic subtitles. With Bayaan, in sha’Allah, we can reverse that, letting people absorb fusha Arabic while following the khutbah with clear, live subtitles.

features.title: donations and direct debits, on autopilot
features.lead: collect support from your community without the admin overhead — built-in payments, recurring SEPA mandates, and automated batch runs.

payments.title: built-in payment system
payments.body: accept one-off and recurring donations through iDEAL, cards, and bank transfer. funds settle straight to your mosque's account.

sepa.title: automatic SEPA direct debits
sepa.body: members sign a digital mandate once. monthly contributions are collected automatically — no reminders, no chasing, no spreadsheets.

batches.title: scheduled debit batches
batches.body: the system queues, validates, and submits SEPA batches on schedule. failed collections are retried with a clean audit trail.

useCases.title: transform every gathering
useCases.lead: from daily prayers to special events, bayaan amplifies your mosque’s impact.

khutbah.title: friday khutbah
khutbah.body: ensure every attendee understands the weekly sermon, regardless of their language.

education.title: islamic education
education.body: make quran classes and hadith studies accessible to all seekers of knowledge.

community.title: community events
community.body: from eid celebrations to iftars, ensure everyone feels included.

dawah.title: dawah programs
dawah.body: expand outreach to non-arabic speakers. let islam reach every heart.

verse.translation: and we have not sent you, [o muhammad], except as a mercy to the worlds.

testimonials.title: mosques thriving with bayaan
testimonials.lead: see how mosques worldwide are expanding their dawah and uniting their communities

ahmad.quote: Bayaan has transformed our Friday prayers. Our non-Arabic speaking youth are finally engaged and understanding the khutbah. This is true Dawah in action.
ahmad.name: Sheikh Ahmad Hassan

mamdouh.quote: As a diverse community with over 15 nationalities, Bayaan bridges our language gaps beautifully. It’s strengthened our bonds and expanded our Dawah reach significantly.
mamdouh.name: Sheikh Mamdouh

yusuf.quote: The simplicity of setup amazed us. Within minutes, our elderly congregation members were accessing translations on their phones. Technology serving faith perfectly.
yusuf.name: Brother Yusuf Ibrahim

contact.title: let's bring bayaan to your mosque
contact.lead: tell us about your community and we'll reach out within one business day.
contact.directBody: for partnerships, custom pricing, or to schedule a live demo — drop us a line and we'll get back to you quickly.
contact.responseTime: we typically respond within one business day, in shaa Allah.
contact.successMessage: Jazak Allahu khayran — your message is on its way. We'll be in touch shortly.
contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again or email us directly.
contact.privacyNote: We'll only use your details to respond to this message.

pricing.title: simple, transparent pricing
pricing.lead: choose a plan that fits your mosque’s needs. no hidden fees, no surprises.

starter.name: starter
starter.summary: perfect for small mosques with friday sermons and occasional announcements

pro.name: professional
pro.summary: ideal for active mosques with regular programs and classes

enterprise.name: enterprise
enterprise.summary: for large mosques and islamic centers with comprehensive needs

transparent.title: transparent pricing
transparent.body: no hidden fees. pay only for what you use.

instant.title: instant activation
instant.body: start translating within minutes of signup.

streaming.title: live streaming
streaming.body: direct integration with youtube live (pro plan).

pricing.zakat: eligible for zakat funds under islamic education and dawah categories

cta.title: ready to expand your dawah reach?
cta.lead: join mosques worldwide in making islamic knowledge accessible to everyone
